config.manus.allowlists_desc: The agent can only use resources explicitly selected here.
config.manus.api_key_empty: Enter a Manus API key first.
config.manus.api_key_existing: Manus API key stored in the vault
config.manus.api_key_save_failed: Could not save the Manus API key
config.manus.api_key_saved: API key saved in the vault
config.manus.catalog_not_loaded: Load the catalog to select resources
config.manus.danger_confirm: You are enabling a permission that can change data or send files to Manus. Continue?
config.manus.default_skills_note: If a task omits an explicit skill selection, Manus may additionally load account-default skills. Explicit skill selections remain restricted to this allowlist.
help.manus.allow_create_tasks: Lets the agent create new private Manus tasks.
help.manus.allow_file_downloads: Lets the agent download attachments from tracked tasks into the isolated Manus workspace.
help.manus.allow_file_uploads: Lets the agent upload eligible workspace files to Manus.
help.manus.allow_send_messages: Lets the agent continue tracked tasks with follow-up messages.
help.manus.allow_stop_tasks: Lets the agent stop tracked tasks.
help.manus.allowed_connectors: Only selected connector IDs may be sent when creating tasks.
help.manus.allowed_projects: Only selected Manus projects may be used.
help.manus.allowed_skills: Only explicitly selected skill IDs may be requested by the agent.
help.manus.api_key: Stored only in AuraGo's encrypted vault. Manus keys have full account access.
help.manus.default_agent_profile: Profile used when the agent does not choose one explicitly.
help.manus.default_locale: Optional locale sent to Manus; leave empty for the account default.
help.manus.enabled: Exposes the native Manus tool to the agent when a vault key is configured.
help.manus.max_file_size_mb: Upper size limit for each upload or download.
help.manus.max_result_bytes: Maximum response body accepted from Manus.
help.manus.max_wait_seconds: A wait operation is always capped at 60 seconds.
help.manus.read_only: Blocks task creation, messages, stops, uploads, and downloads even if enabled below.
help.manus.request_timeout_seconds: Timeout for individual Manus API requests.
